allow: PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($c\) { $p = Get-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess; "PID $\($p.Id\): $\($p.ProcessName\) | $\($p.Path\)"; "CmdLine: " + \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($p.Id\)"\).CommandLine } else { "Nothing listening on 8000" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess; "PID $\($p.Id\): $\($p.ProcessName\) | " + \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($p.Id\)"\).CommandLine })
Bash(grep -rln "Resource not found" "d:/My Projects/Kasu Media Labs/backend/vendor" 2>&1 | head; echo "---"; cat /tmp/artisan.log 2>&1 | head -20)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('projects:',len\(d.get\('projects',[]\)\) if isinstance\(d.get\('projects'\),list\) else d.get\('projects'\)\); print\('categories:',len\(d.get\('categories',[]\)\) if isinstance\(d.get\('categories'\),list\) else 'n/a'\); print\('keys:',list\(d.keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -uroot -e 'SELECT status, COUNT\(*\) FROM kml_admin.projects GROUP BY status;')
Bash(C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -uroot -e 'SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS categories FROM kml_admin.categories;')
